response.justification: Wei Chen has extensive experience in software engineering with a strong background in C/C++ from early roles, but their recent work has been primarily in JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and D programming language, with no clear evidence of recent C++ development, secure industrial cybersecurity practices, or familiarity with the required standards (IEC 62443-4-1). Their expertise in web and mobile development does not align closely with the role's focus on high-performance, secure, and scalable C++ solutions for industrial automation.
strengths: Strong background in C/C++ from earlier career stages (e.g., National Instruments, Apon)
Proven experience in software architecture, agile methodologies, and open-source project leadership (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Demonstrated ability to learn and adapt to new technologies and domains (e.g., IoT, real-time systems, robotics)
concerns: Lack of recent C++ development experience (last C++ role was over 10 years ago)
No explicit mention of secure development lifecycle (SDL) or IEC 62443-4-1 standards compliance
Limited exposure to cloud platforms (only AWS CDK mentioned) and industrial automation protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, etc.)
